results.title: Search Tour

bugs.title: Assertion failed in validator tool
bugs.description: The `record_assertion` tool returned an error 'Assertion with ID 11 not found.' when trying to record an assertion for the automated test 'Search Tour'.
bugs.expected: The `record_assertion` tool should successfully record the assertion.
bugs.actual: The `record_assertion` tool returned an error: 'Assertion with ID 11 not found.'.

results.agentOutput: I have recorded a bug regarding the failure of the `record_assertion` tool. The bug ID is BUG-1770936734350.

results.title: Search Car Rental

assertions.evidence: Current URL is https://guidetoiceland.is/cart/checkout. "Complete your reservation" heading is visible and "Toyota Yaris FREE Wi-Fi 2023" is displayed in the shopping cart with a total of 163 USD.

assertions.description: At least one Car Rental Card is visible
assertions.evidence: The search results page displayed multiple car rental cards, and the agent successfully clicked on one with ID 94 to proceed.

assertions.description: Test opens up Car product page
assertions.evidence: The current URL is https://guidetoiceland.is/car-rental/search-results/book/Toyota%20Yaris%20FREE%20Wi-Fi%202023/15061, which is a car product page.

assertions.description: Test add Car product to cart
assertions.evidence: The car product was added to the cart, and the current URL is https://guidetoiceland.is/cart/summary, which is the cart summary page.
The current URL is https://guidetoiceland.is/cart/checkout, which is the checkout page.

results.agentOutput: All assertions for the "Search Car Rental" automated test have been successfully recorded and passed. The test is complete.
